Compliance.description: Major SARB PA bank, FSCA FSP; solid governance; some media coverage on culture issues but no 2025/26 formal sanctions.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.74/5; in-person feedback mixed; app reviews better.

Product Value.description: Good range but fees average vs Capitec/TymeBank; strong business suite.

Innovation.description: Shyft FX app, API marketplace, MyMo account, PayShap, open banking.

Customer Support.description: Large support infrastructure; HelloPeter score suggests resolution gaps.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide; solid app; POPIA; some phishing/fraud events but robust security controls.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: MyMo R4.95/mo; Elite R195/mo; Prestige from R149/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Business banking praised; retail customer complaints common.
